title: OX Pro Taping Knife - 8" / 200mm
features: FLEXIBLE STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: The blade of the OX PRO Series Taping Knife is forged from high-quality stainless steel that is flexible, corrosion and adhesive resistant.
DURA GRIP SOFT HANDLE: OX PRO Series Taping Spatula Knife fitted with OX Dura Grip soft handle for ultimate comfort. The handle end has a built-in hammer for stubborn nail pops
STRONG ALUMINUM BACK: The stainless steel blade of the OX PRO Taping Knife is attached to a strong aluminum backer plate. They are riveted together to extend the life of the putty filling knife.

MULTI UTILITY TOOL: The Taping Spatula Knife is a multi utility tool that can be used for filler, caulk, plaster, putty, scraping, paint and wallpaper removal, and more. The solid hammer end can be to set drywall nails
TOUGH AS AN OX: The OX PRO Series Taping Knife is built using only the highest quality of materials that go through stringent quality control measures to give you the best value of money
description: OX PRO Series Taping Knife OX PRO Series Taping Knife with a flexible stainless steel blade is a multipurpose tool. The blade is forged from a high-grade stainless steel that's flexible. The stainless steel blade is attached to a strong aluminum backer plate. The Taping Spatula blade is riveted to the Dura Grip soft handle for ultimate comfort and long life. The handle is fitted with a hammer for stubborn nail pops and to set drywall nails. With the OX PRO Taping Knife, you are assured to get only the best quality products that are built to last.. Features: Flexible stainless steel blade Dura grip soft handle Strong aluminum back Riveted handle and blade joint Size - 8 inch / 200mm Package includes: 1×OX Pro Taping Knife Founded in 1974 in Australia, OX Tools has since worked alongside tradesmen to deliver just what they need! Our products are built using only the finest materials and go through a stringent quality control to ensure that you get nothing but the best. For 40+ years, OX Tools has been instinctively recognized as a premium manufacturer of hand and power tools that are tough, dynamic, dependable and most importantly affordable across the globe. We're proud to be known for raising the benchmark of hand and power tools in the UK since 2012.
